# Gcore JavaScript Video Player SDK

> JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for embedding HLS, MPEG-DASH, and MP4 video playback into web applications.
> NPM package: `@gcorevideo/player`
> Repository: https://github.com/G-Core/gcore-videoplayer-js

## What this is

A production video player SDK built on Clappr. Customers use it instead of an iframe embed when they need native DOM integration, custom UI, event-driven app integration, and an extensible plugin model.

Supports: HLS (`.m3u8`), MPEG-DASH (`.mpd`), MP4. Live and VOD. Framework-agnostic.

## Install

```bash
npm install @gcorevideo/player
```

CDN (no build step):
```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://player.gvideo.co/v2/assets/latest/index.css" />
<script type="module">
  import { Player, MediaControl, SourceController } from 'https://player.gvideo.co/v2/assets/latest/index.js'
</script>
```

## Minimal working example

```ts
import '@gcorevideo/player/dist/index.css'
import { Player, MediaControl, SourceController } from '@gcorevideo/player'

// 1. Register plugins BEFORE creating any player instance
Player.registerPlugin(MediaControl)
Player.registerPlugin(SourceController)

// 2. Create with config
const player = new Player({
  autoPlay: true,
  mute: true,                    // required for autoplay in browsers
  sources: ['https://demo-public.gvideo.io/videos/2675_w6nGXEimHz4Z6t1j/master.m3u8'],
})

// 3. Attach to a DOM element with real dimensions
player.attachTo(document.getElementById('player')!)

// 4. Destroy when done
// player.destroy()
```

## The five things every integration needs

1. **CSS import** — `import '@gcorevideo/player/dist/index.css'`
2. **Plugin registration** — `Player.registerPlugin(...)` before `new Player(...)`
3. **`sources` array** — at least one URL string or `{ source, mimeType }` object
4. **DOM element** — `player.attachTo(element)` where element has width and height
5. **Cleanup** — `player.destroy()` before removing the element from the DOM

## Key PlayerConfig options

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `sources` | `PlayerMediaSource[]` | required | Array of source URLs or `{ source, mimeType }` objects |
| `autoPlay` | `boolean` | `false` | Start playback immediately |
| `mute` | `boolean` | `false` | Mute audio (pair with autoPlay) |
| `loop` | `boolean` | `false` | Loop VOD playback |
| `playbackType` | `'live' \| 'vod'` | `'vod'` | Stream type — set only if known in advance |
| `priorityTransport` | `'dash' \| 'hls'` | `'dash'` | Preferred protocol when multiple sources given |
| `poster` | `PosterPluginSettings` | — | Poster image config: `{ url, showForNoOp, showOnVideoEnd }` |
| `language` | `string` | `'en'` | UI language code |
| `strings` | `TranslationSettings` | — | Custom localization strings |
| `debug` | `'all' \| 'none' \| boolean` | `'none'` | Debug log level |

Plugin-specific options are nested under a key matching the plugin name (e.g. `poster`, `cmcd`, `googleAnalytics`).

## Available plugins

### Playback
`AudioTracks`, `ClickToPause`, `Clips`, `DvrControls`, `MultiCamera`, `PictureInPicture`, `PlaybackRate`, `Poster`, `QualityLevels`, `SeekTime`, `Share`, `SkipTime`, `SourceController`, `ClosedCaptions` (alias: `Subtitles`), `Thumbnails`

### UI
`BigMuteButton`, `BottomGear`, `ContextMenu`, `ErrorScreen`, `Favicon`, `Logo`, `MediaControl`, `SpinnerThreeBounce` (alias: `Spinner`), `VolumeFade`

### Analytics
`ClapprStats`, `CmcdConfig`, `GoogleAnalytics`, `NerdStats`, `Telemetry`

## Player methods

```ts
player.play()           // start playback
player.pause()          // pause
player.stop()           // stop
player.seek(seconds)    // jump to position
player.mute()
player.unmute()
player.setVolume(0..1)
player.isMuted(): boolean
player.isPlaying(): boolean
player.getCurrentTime(): number
player.getDuration(): number
player.isDvrEnabled(): boolean
player.load(sources)    // swap sources without destroying
player.destroy()        // release all resources
```

## Events

```ts
import { PlayerEvent } from '@gcorevideo/player'

player.on(PlayerEvent.Ready, () => {})
player.on(PlayerEvent.Play, () => {})
player.on(PlayerEvent.Pause, () => {})
player.on(PlayerEvent.Ended, () => {})
player.on(PlayerEvent.TimeUpdate, ({ current, total }) => {})
player.on(PlayerEvent.VolumeUpdate, (volume: number) => {})
player.on(PlayerEvent.Seek, (seconds: number) => {})
player.on(PlayerEvent.Fullscreen, (isFullscreen: boolean) => {})
player.on(PlayerEvent.Resize, ({ width, height }) => {})
player.on(PlayerEvent.Error, (error: PlaybackError) => {})
```

## Documentation index

- Quick start: `docs/quick-start.md`
- Install guide: `docs/install-and-configure.md`
- Framework integration (React, Vue, Next.js): `docs/framework-integration.md`

- AI development guide: `AI-DEVELOPMENT.md`
- Architecture: `docs/architecture.md`
- Code map: `docs/codemap.md`
- Generated API reference: `packages/player/docs/api/player.md`
- Public types: `packages/player/src/types.ts`
- Player class: `packages/player/src/Player.ts`
- All plugin exports: `packages/player/src/index.plugins.ts`

## Plugin development pattern

```ts
import { UICorePlugin } from '@clappr/core'

export class MyPlugin extends UICorePlugin {
  name = 'my_plugin'
  static type = 'core'   // or 'container' for ContainerPlugin

  bindEvents() {
    this.listenTo(this.core, Events.PLAYER_PLAY, this.onPlay)
  }

  private onPlay() { /* ... */ }
}

Player.registerPlugin(MyPlugin)
```

Plugin config is passed via `PlayerConfig` under the plugin's `name` key:
```ts
new Player({ my_plugin: { someOption: true }, sources: [...] })
```
